main.name: Zain
main.occupation: CPaaS & VoIP Systems Builder — Backend, SIP & Linux Infrastructure
main.description: I build and operate lightweight communication systems, focusing on VoIP, CPaaS platforms, SIP-based infrastructure, backend APIs, and automation tools.
main.bio: I'm Zain, an independent developer building Voice Operations SaaS. I work on VoIP systems, CPaaS infrastructure, and backend services from the ground up, focusing on SIP, Asterisk, Linux systems, automation, and practical monitoring tools.
main.contactmessage: Interested in communication systems, automation, or backend infrastructure? Let's connect.

projects.title: CPaaS Platform (Voice Operations System)
projects.about: A lightweight CPaaS system for voice automation and call handling. Built with backend APIs, communication workflows, and integration with cloud telephony services.

projects.title: Discord AI Assistant Bot
projects.about: An AI assistant for Discord built with OpenAI and ElevenLabs, supporting conversational AI, voice interaction, and automation features.

projects.title: VoIP & SIP Infrastructure Tools
projects.about: Tools and experiments for SIP, Asterisk, call monitoring, AMD detection, and communication system observability.

projects.title: Roblox Game Project
projects.about: A Roblox game built with Roblox Studio and Lua, focused on gameplay mechanics and interactive experience.

projects.title: Discord Game Bot (In Progress)
projects.about: A Discord bot in development focused on game mechanics, player interaction, and community features.

projects.title: E-commerce Web App (In Progress)
projects.about: A web application with product management, checkout flow, and Stripe payment integration.
